description:
Bad look for a mutation-testing tool: `mix test --cover` produces 3 failures and an Enum.EmptyError crash in the coverage reporter.

Root cause: two assertions assume :cover_server is NOT running, which cover itself violates:
- test/mutagen_ex/scope_resolver_test.exs:374 — `refute Process.whereis(:cover_server)`
- test/mutagen_ex/scope_resolver_property_test.exs:164 — same

Fix: guard or skip those assertions when running under cover (e.g. detect cover and skip, or assert the no-side-effect invariant a different way). Also investigate the Enum.EmptyError in report generation (:cover compiled zero project modules).

Acceptance: `mix test --cover` runs clean and prints a coverage number.
title: Fix mix test --cover (3 failures + crash)
